name: Bright Fungal Cloak
description:
While wearing a Bright Fungal Cloak, you can take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to furl or unfurl it. When the cloak is unfurled, it sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 5-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 5 feet.
One pound of fungus is sewn into a Bright Fungal Cloak. This fungus can be eaten as food. Once all the fungus is consumed, the cloak becomes a mundane set of {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}.
